mapper.select: SELECT s.SPACE_NO, s.SPACE_NAME, s.ADDRESS, s.DETAIL_ADDR, (SELECT COALESCE(h.NAME, m.LOGIN_ID) FROM MEMBER m LEFT JOIN HOST_DETAIL h ON m.MEMBER_ID = h.MEMBER_ID WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = s.HOST_ID) AS hostName, (SELECT MIN(PRICE_PER_HOUR) FROM SPACE_UNIT WHERE SPACE_NO = s.SPACE_NO) AS pricePerHour, (SELECT DESCRIPTION FROM SPACE_UNIT WHERE SPACE_NO = s.SPACE_NO AND ROWNUM = 1) AS description FROM SPACE s WHERE s.SPACE_NO = #{spaceNo}
SELECT FILE_URL FROM SPACE_IMAGE WHERE SPACE_NO = #{spaceNo} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC

SELECT DISTINCT o.OPTION_NO, o.NAME, o.ICON_URL FROM SPACE_OPTION o JOIN SELECTED_SPACE_OPTION sso ON o.OPTION_NO = sso.OPTION_NO JOIN SPACE_UNIT u ON sso.UNIT_NO = u.UNIT_NO WHERE u.SPACE_NO = #{spaceNo}

SELECT u.UNIT_NO, u.TITLE, u.PRICE_PER_HOUR, u.MAX_CAPACITY, u.DESCRIPTION, u.THUMBNAIL_URL, p.MIN_HOURS FROM SPACE_UNIT u JOIN SPACE_POLICY p ON u.UNIT_NO = p.UNIT_NO WHERE u.SPACE_NO = #{spaceNo} ORDER BY u.UNIT_NO ASC
